name: MBK Co.,Ltd.
summary: MBK Co.,Ltd. engages in the merchant banking, hotel, and sports fitness businesses in Japan and China. Its activities include equity investment and debt finance for corporate and real estate; fund management and advisory; intermediate the transaction of corporate equity and real estate; operating management of hotels and sport facilities; and property management of hotels and sport facilities. The company was formerly known as Asset Investors Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MBK Co.,Ltd. in July 2009. MBK Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
